name: Barbecued Duck and Wild Mushroom Quesadilla (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the legs in a casserole dish and brush with barbecue sauce.
2. Pour stock around the legs.
3. Cover and bake for 3 hours at 300°F, basting every 30 minutes.
4. Let cool, then pick off the duck meat.
5. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
6. Place 2 tortillas on a work surface. Spread half of the cheeses, duck meat, and mushrooms on each tortilla and season with salt and pepper.
7. Stack the layers, cover with the remaining tortilla, brush with 1 tablespoon oil, and sprinkle evenly with chili powder.
8. Grill for 3 minutes on each side, or until the tortillas are slightly crisp and the cheese has melted.
9. Cut into quarters and serve hot, garnished with salsa.
Yield: 4 first-course servings
